# Planned Valid CRAM Fixtures

This directory is reserved for committed valid CRAM artifacts once the tiny
source provenance packages are materialized into derived binaries.

The first planned artifact is:

* `tiny.valid.cram.explicit_ref.cram`

That CRAM should always be reviewed together with:

* `tests/fixtures/source/tiny.valid.cram.explicit_ref.source.sam`
* `tests/fixtures/source/tiny.ref.primary.fasta`

until a maintainer intentionally accepts a regenerated binary artifact.
